DeviceReading.title: Device Reading
DeviceReading.description: A single decibel reading from a sensor device.

decibel.description: The decibel value of the noise reading.

timestamp.description: The server timestamp of when the reading was recorded.

zone.description: The zone identifier for the device (e.g., 'Front Left').

status.description: The online status of the sensor device.

Sensor.title: Sensor
Sensor.description: A sensor device that records environmental data.

level.description: The reading value from the sensor.

status.description: The online status of the sensor device.

lastUpdated.description: The server timestamp of when the reading was recorded.

/devices/{deviceId}.description: Stores real-time decibel readings from sensor devices like Mic_A, Mic_B, etc.

/sensors/{sensorId}.description: Stores real-time data from sensor devices.
